name: Smart Invoice (Ceremonial)
description: AI-Optimized layout with dynamic upsells and modern typography.
author: Floovioo

features.name: Document Header
features.description: Standard issuer branding, invoice number, and status indicators.

features.name: Customer Details
features.description: Bill-to/Ship-to information and Loyalty Status badge.

features.name: Line Items Table
features.description: Detailed breakdown of purchased products, quantities, and totals.

features.name: Promotional Banner Widget
features.description: Sliding offers, announcements, and referral codes.

features.name: Product Recommendations Widget
features.description: AI-driven cross-sell suggestions based on purchase history.

features.name: Marketing Nurture Card (Tutorials)
features.description: Dynamic tutorials, recipes, or setup guides for purchased items.

features.name: Payment Details Widget
features.description: Bank details and payment method summary.

features.name: Customer Support Widget
features.description: Direct contact options and help resources.

features.name: Document Footer
features.description: Terms, legal disclaimers, and page numbering.
